description_long: This is a dark wooden shelving unit with four evenly spaced horizontal shelves supported by two thick vertical side panels. The structure is rectangular, with the side panels slightly wider at the base, giving it a stable stance. The shelves are open, with no backing or doors, allowing for easy access from the front. The wood has a rich, deep brown finish, and the surface appears smooth and polished, reflecting a subtle sheen. There are no visible handles, glass panels, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. This type of shelving unit is suitable for storing books, decorative items, or tools in urban environments such as garages, offices, or public spaces.
description: A dark brown, open wooden shelving unit with four shelves and a minimalist, functional design. The surface is smooth and polished, with no doors or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the full width of the shelving unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the open back and shelf structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the depth and solid side construction.
